title: cephalaria leucantha var. mediterranea
intro: Cephalaria leucantha var. mediterranea, also known as the Mediterranean goat's beard or white hawk's wing, is a plant species in the family Valerianaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and fighting off infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to treat respiratory issues, gastrointestinal problems, and skin conditions. In traditional medicine, Cephalaria leucantha var. mediterranea is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions.
